name: salesforce
description: Connect Salesforce Service Cloud and Sales Cloud for customer support and CRM workflows

envVars.name: SALESFORCE_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Salesforce OAuth Consumer Key (from your Connected App)

tools.name: Find Customer
tools.description: Find customer contacts with account context for support triage. Pass a focused SOQL query when searching by email, name, phone, or account.

q.description: SOQL Contact query. Include Account fields when the agent needs customer context.
q.default: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Title, AccountId, Account.Name, Account.Type, Account.Industry FROM Contact ORDER BY LastModifiedDate DESC LIMIT 25

tools.name: Search Accounts
tools.description: Search Salesforce accounts with business context for support or sales work

q.default: SELECT Id, Name, Type, Industry, Phone, Website, OwnerId, LastModifiedDate FROM Account ORDER BY LastModifiedDate DESC LIMIT 50

tools.name: Get Account
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific account

tools.name: Search Contacts
tools.description: Search contacts with account fields for CRM follow-up and support context

q.default: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Title, AccountId, Account.Name FROM Contact ORDER BY LastModifiedDate DESC LIMIT 50

tools.name: Get Contact
tools.description: Get a Salesforce contact by ID

tools.name: List Cases
tools.description: List Service Cloud cases for a customer, account, owner, status, or queue

q.description: SOQL Case query. Filter by ContactId, AccountId, Status, OwnerId, Priority, or CreatedDate as needed.
q.default: SELECT Id, CaseNumber, Subject, Status, Priority, Origin, ContactId, AccountId, OwnerId, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate FROM Case ORDER BY LastModifiedDate DESC LIMIT 50

tools.name: Get Case
tools.description: Get a Service Cloud case by ID

tools.name: List Case Activity
tools.description: List case comments for support handoff, timeline review, and resolution context

q.description: SOQL CaseComment query. Add WHERE ParentId = '<caseId>' to inspect one case.
q.default: SELECT Id, ParentId, CommentBody, CreatedDate, CreatedById, IsPublished FROM CaseComment ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 50

tools.name: Search Knowledge Articles
tools.description: Search published Salesforce Knowledge articles that can help answer or deflect a support case

q.description: SOQL KnowledgeArticleVersion query. Filter by Title, Summary, DataCategory, or language when needed.
q.default: SELECT Id, KnowledgeArticleId, Title, Summary, UrlName, Language, LastPublishedDate FROM KnowledgeArticleVersion WHERE PublishStatus = 'Online' ORDER BY LastPublishedDate DESC LIMIT 25

tools.name: List Opportunities
tools.description: List Sales Cloud opportunities for account planning and customer context

q.default: SELECT Id, Name, StageName, Amount, CloseDate, AccountId, OwnerId, LastModifiedDate FROM Opportunity ORDER BY CloseDate DESC LIMIT 50

tools.name: Create Lead
tools.description: Create a new lead in Salesforce CRM

tools.name: Create Case
tools.description: Create a Service Cloud case for customer support

tools.name: Add Case Comment
tools.description: Add a support note or customer-visible comment to a Service Cloud case

IsPublished.description: Whether the comment is visible externally

tools.name: Update Case
tools.description: Update status, priority, owner, or resolution fields on a Service Cloud case

tools.name: Describe Object
tools.description: Get metadata and field definitions for a Salesforce object

sobjectType.description: Salesforce object API name, for example Case, Account, Contact, Opportunity, or a custom object

tools.name: Run SOQL Query
tools.description: Run a read-only SOQL query for expert inspection when curated tools are not enough

q.description: Read-only SOQL query, for example SELECT Id, Subject FROM Case LIMIT 10

prompts.title: Support triage
prompts.prompt: Find the customer in Salesforce, summarize their open cases, and suggest the next support action.

prompts.title: Create a support case
prompts.prompt: Create a Salesforce Service Cloud case with the customer, subject, priority, and issue summary I provide.

prompts.title: Search Knowledge
prompts.prompt: Search Salesforce Knowledge for articles that answer this customer support issue.

prompts.title: Pipeline summary
prompts.prompt: Summarize Salesforce opportunities for this account and highlight any renewal or expansion context relevant to support.

setupGuide.title: Salesforce Connected App Setup

steps.title: Create a Salesforce test org
steps.description: Use a sandbox or free Developer Edition org for staging. Enable Service Cloud, Cases, and Knowledge if the demo needs support workflows.

steps.title: Create a Connected App
steps.description: In Salesforce Setup, create a Connected App with OAuth enabled. Add the Veryfront callback URL for the target environment.

steps.title: Configure OAuth scopes
steps.description: Add api, refresh_token, and offline_access scopes. Use the Web Server Flow with a client secret for Veryfront API environments.

steps.title: Store Veryfront environment credentials
steps.description: Set SALESFORCE_CLIENT_ID and SALESFORCE_CLIENT_SECRET for the matching Veryfront environment. Keep staging and production credentials separate.

steps.title: Grant least-privilege Salesforce permissions
steps.description: Assign the connected user access to Account, Contact, Case, CaseComment, Opportunity, Lead, and Knowledge objects required by the enabled tools.

notes: Write tools should be explicitly enabled for an agent or project; read tools are the default demo surface.
